role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text/script and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (Andes, rainforest).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (Valdivian rainforest) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (utility poles, road surfaces) and building codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (construction styles, image generation artifacts) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Chile by leveraging the meta-agent's synthesis of architectural and infrastructural cues, supported by landscape and botanics evidence. The linguistic agent appropriately remained silent due to lack of textual evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of mountains, clouds, and vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate rainforest vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of utility poles and road surfaces match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of corrugated metal siding and wooden poles match the image.
